'''Nuba City''' was the capital and the largest city of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. Located on the western side of a mountain range, it was an industrial city. Containing many factories, the city was often shrouded in dense smog. As the planet's financial center, it hosted many of Nubia's glittering [[Skyscraper/Legends|skyscrapers]], which were arranged in a chaotic jumble dominating the urban landscape.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

An underground monorail provided mass transit in and around the city. The most popular cantina found here was ''[[The Dark Side of the Planet]]'', owned by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Tul Bulba]].

To the west of the city, there was a full-service [[Nuba City Spaceport|spaceport]].
